meaning: vt.逐出国外,脱离国籍,放逐vi.移居国外n.亡命国外者
examples: The expatriate vote could help determine who wins in November.
Either the novel with White ethnic main characters or the "raceless" novel appears, at least as an experiment, in the careers of the best-known expatriate African American writers.
Many people, Chinese and expatriate, did just that.
All the glamour and experience associated with being an expatriate executive is not without sacrifice.
The expatriate will have to decide if retaining his U.S. citizenship is worth risking this penalty.
